source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: 世界杯爆大冷 天台都要挤不下了
topics.official_english: World Cup Upsets: Fans in Shock as Favorites Fall
topics.why_hot: Major World Cup upsets generate widespread discussion and emotional reactions among fans.
topics.share_angle: Explain the upsets and their impact on the tournament, focusing on the drama and unpredictability of sports.

topics.share_angle: Highlight the financial disparity and the beauty of sports where money doesn't guarantee victory.

topics.official_english: Where Have Trillions in Deposits Gone?

topics.share_angle: Explain possible reasons for the deposit decline, such as consumption or investment shifts, and what it means for the economy.
